settings.title: {{ article.title }}
settings.description:
For Karina Enever and Chris Enever, their relationship was fate. After countless encounters, and rediscoveries of their deep connection they recognised the sanctity in this bond. 

In celebration of our Anam Cara collection, we explore the notion “souls don’t meet by accident”. Something that reins so strongly with Karina and Chris’ story. This collection honours those special bonds, someone occupies the most sacred and special parts of our lives, who read us like stories they know by heart. 

Join us as we reflect on their journey to this day, a year on from tying the knot.

settings.content_intro:
DO: BUY WHAT YOU LOVE

Natalie: Simply, a piece of vintage jewellery should be chosen because it resonates with you, and because you fall in love with it. Not only are they imbued with the histories and stories of their past owners, but vintage jewellery also provides an opportunity to embrace sustainable purchasing habits – offering once-cherished designs a second (or third) lease on life.

I have always had a love for vintage jewellery, or vintage anything really. I used to spend hours in op shops collecting all sorts of odd finds – furniture, clothes, hats, even once a vintage suitcase which I used to transport and display my first ever collection! I love the mystery and enigmatic nature of vintage pieces, the opportunity for speculation on their history and journey. I also have a deep reverence for the incredible craftsmanship many of these piece’s hold. So much tradition and heritage exists in every tiny detail, which is where my love for vintage jewellery originates from.

I encourage you to find your spark. Is it a particular stone colour or cut, the setting or design style or maybe even the piece’s provenance and era that speaks to you? Is it because it reminds you of a place, someone special or loved ones from generations past? I always like to remind clients that jewellery doesn’t have to be engraved or marked with a special stone to become solely yours – it can be anything about the piece that sparks a feeling or takes you back to a moment in time.

There’s a sense of romance and allure inherit in vintage pieces, and finding the perfect design should feel akin to falling in love: a lightning bolt of recognition; the sense that you two were destined to be connected.

settings.description:
Tell us about yourselves and how you met.

Our roots trace back to growing up together in the northern beaches of Sydney, where our lives seemed destined to intertwine. It all began on the dance floor in Manly, and after years of a captivating dance of fate, we found ourselves irresistibly drawn to one another, repeatedly rediscovering our connection.


Chris, what drew you to Karina?

What initially drew me to Karina were her alluring brown eyes, long brown hair, and her goddess-like features. Beyond her physical beauty, it was her confidence, determination, infectious sense of fun, bubbly personality, and the inspiration she radiated that truly captured my heart.


Karina, what is it about Chris that you are you most grateful for?

Chris's allure lies in his unwavering confidence and mischievous charm. His audacious spirit first piqued my interest, and I've always been grateful for his vibrant personality. Chris taught me the beauty of not taking life too seriously, always infusing it with fun and laughter. He's been my guide to letting go and embracing love wholeheartedly.

settings.title: "Our lives seemed destined to intertwine... after years of a captivating dance of fate, we found ourselves irresistibly drawn to one another, repeatedly rediscovering our connection".

settings.description:
“Souls don't meet by accident". How true does this feel for you both and the unbreakable bond you have formed during your lives together?

Though we may have attempted to dismiss our initial encounter(s) as a mere accident in the past, the undeniable truth is that our connection is unbreakable, even during those moments when we drive each other to the brink of madness.


Can you tell us about your fondest memories or shared experiences that have shaped and strengthened the deep connection you have today?

One of the standout experiences in our journey together was embarking on a beach/off-grid camping adventure as part of our honeymoon. Completely disconnected from the modern world, we faced the wilderness as novices, navigating the challenges of nature hand in hand. Through tides, creepy-crawlies, culinary experiments, and rationed supplies (including the all-important alcohol), we shared moments of laughter, bewilderment, and the sheer joy of figuring it all out together. This escapade not only deepened our respect for each other but also showcased our unique ability to understand one another like no one else can, especially when camping.


After celebrating your one-year anniversary this year, how has marriage enhanced and shifted your relationship? 

To maintain authenticity and keep it real, the concept of marriage has brought both moments of great joy and challenging times into our relationship. At times, the weight of societal expectations and pressures crept in, causing us to question what comes next. However, we've learned that it's essential to do things in our own time, when we are truly ready, returning to the true essence of marriage for us. It's become a joyful celebration of our love, a testament to our commitment to live and love together forever. Our unbreakable bond, which we consider ourselves fortunate to have found, remains at the core of our union. 


Karina wears the Cara Ring and her NMJ Engagement ring. Chris wears the Anam Charm Necklace.

settings.description:
At NMJ, we believe that jewellery is an investment – something to love, wear and treasure forever. And while we are passionate about creating modern heirlooms for our clients, we also have a soft spot for vintage jewellery.

Immortalising nostalgia, vintage designs remain an integral source of inspiration for our founder Natalie Fitch, who believes that by breathing new life into time-worn pieces, we are also able to foster a more conscious, circular approach to purchasing. “I love the mystery and enigmatic nature of vintage pieces; the opportunity for speculation on their history and journey,” she says. However, for the uninitiated, the prospect of shopping pre-loved treasures can be daunting. What are some key features to look out for? How do you know you’ve found the one?

On the NMJ Journal, we ask our in-house expert – our founder, Natalie Fitch – for her guide to purchasing vintage, how to care for your finds and what sparked her love for jewellery with a past.


DO: BUY WHAT YOU LOVE

Natalie: Simply, a piece of vintage jewellery should be chosen because it resonates with you, and because you fall in love with it. Not only are they imbued with the histories and stories of their past owners, but vintage jewellery also provides an opportunity to embrace sustainable purchasing habits – offering once-cherished designs a second (or third) lease on life.

I have always had a love for vintage jewellery, or vintage anything really. I used to spend hours in op shops collecting all sorts of odd finds – furniture, clothes, hats, even once a vintage suitcase which I used to transport and display my first ever collection! I love the mystery and enigmatic nature of vintage pieces, the opportunity for speculation on their history and journey. I also have a deep reverence for the incredible craftsmanship many of these piece’s hold. So much tradition and heritage exists in every tiny detail, which is where my love for vintage jewellery originates from.

I encourage you to find your spark. Is it a particular stone colour or cut, the setting or design style or maybe even the piece’s provenance and era that speaks to you? Is it because it reminds you of a place, someone special or loved ones from generations past? I always like to remind clients that jewellery doesn’t have to be engraved or marked with a special stone to become solely yours – it can be anything about the piece that sparks a feeling or takes you back to a moment in time.

There’s a sense of romance and allure inherit in vintage pieces, and finding the perfect design should feel akin to falling in love: a lightning bolt of recognition; the sense that you two were destined to be connected.

settings.feature_text: It rained and it poured on our wedding day! But it was perfect in every way.

settings.title: Anam Cara
settings.description: Our Anam Cara collection heroes the Love Knot motif. Formed with a continuous piece of metal with no definitive start or end, it serves as an ode to our soul friends: those who occupy the most sacred and special parts of our lives.
